blur_detection.description: The text and edges are moderately blurred, likely due to camera movement or low resolution.
blur_detection.recommendation: Re-scan the document with a higher resolution and ensure the camera is stable.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is slightly low, but still legible.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Improve lighting conditions and ensure uniform background for better contrast.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected on the document.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration detected.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears or folds detected on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the document edges are slightly cut off.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when scanning.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections detected; the document appears complete.

obstructions.description: No obstructions or shadows detected on the document.

classification.reasoning: The document contains all necessary fields to be classified as an expense: supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, itemDescriptionLineItems, and paymentMethod. The document is a tax invoice for a professional service (Sales Navigator Core) and includes all required details for expense classification.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 7 out of 8 schema fields, including critical fields like supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, itemDescriptionLineItems, and paymentMethod. This meets the criteria for being classified as an expense.

extraction.special_notes: You'll pay €99.17 (inclusive of all applicable taxes) each month until you cancel. Cancel anytime by clicking the "me" icon on the homepage -> click Settings & Privacy -> select Manage Premium Account go to Admin Center -> select your subscription Cancel. See here for detailed instructions on how to cancel. Prices are subject to change. Have questions or need help? Please visit our Help Center.

issues.description: The receipt does not show the local employer company name "Global People IT-Services GmbH" as required.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Local Employer company name must appear on invoices

issues.description: The receipt does not show the local employer address "Kärntner Ring 12, A-1010 Vienna, Austria" as required.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Local Employer address must appear on invoices

issues.description: The receipt does not show the local employer VAT ID "ATU77112189" as required.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Local Employer VAT ID must appear on invoices

issues.description: Training expenses require the approval of the direct manager.
issues.recommendation: Please obtain the approval of the direct manager for this training expense.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Training expenses require the approval of the direct manager

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is non-compliant due to missing local employer details and required approvals. Corrective actions are needed to align with the compliance standards.
